title: Department Manager Vacancy at Tupperware India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Tupperware India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tupperware India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Tupperware India South Asia Partners:
Tupperware India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India South Asia Partners!
